title: First Church of Springfield
tagline: A church family in the heart of Springfield.
mission: Loving God and loving our neighbors in downtown Springfield.

newsletter.heading: Subscribe to our newsletter
newsletter.blurb: News, reflections, and what is coming up at church, in your inbox.

seoDescription: A welcoming church family in downtown Springfield. Join us for worship on Sundays at 10am, in person or online.
heroHeadline: A church family in the heart of Springfield.
heroSubhead: Whoever you are and wherever you are on your journey of faith, you are welcome here.
welcomeHeadline: A historic congregation with an open door
welcomeBodyP1: First Church has gathered in downtown Springfield for generations. We worship, study, serve our neighbors, and share life together.
welcomeBodyP2: Come as you are on a Sunday morning. There is a seat saved for you.
inclusiveStatement: Whoever you are, wherever you are on your journey of faith, you are welcome here.
inclusiveBody: We are an inclusive congregation, and we welcome the full participation of everyone in the life and leadership of the church.

seoTitle: Plan a Visit · First Church of Springfield
seoDescription: What to expect on a Sunday at First Church: when we gather, where to park, and how to help your kids feel at home.
heroHeadline: There's a place for you here.
heroSubhead: Whether you're a weekly churchgoer, haven't been in ages, or don't know anything about Christianity, you are welcome at First Church.

seoDescription: Reach First Church of Springfield. Address, phone, email, office hours, and how to find us downtown.
heroHeadline: We'd love to hear from you
heroSubhead: The best way to meet us is in person on a Sunday. Until then, the church office is glad to help.
formIntroNote: Send us a note and a real person will read it and write back. If something is urgent or about pastoral care, mention that and we'll make sure it reaches the right person quickly.
gettingHereBody: We are on Main Street in downtown Springfield, close to public transit, with free parking behind the building.
finalCtaHeadline: We hope to see you Sunday
finalCtaSubhead: We gather for worship every Sunday. Whoever you are, you are welcome here.

question: What time is worship?
answer: Worship is every Sunday at 10am and usually lasts a little over an hour. We are at 123 Main Street in downtown Springfield.

question: What should I wear?
answer: Whatever feels right to you. Some people dress up, many do not. Come as you are.

question: Is there something for my kids?
answer: Yes. Children are welcome in worship, and we have a children's message during the service. Ask a greeter and they will show your family around.

title: Sunday Worship
summary: Our weekly service of word and sacrament. Everyone is welcome.

title: Main Street Block Party
summary: Free fun for our neighbors of all ages, and open to the public. (This is example content: give it a real date or delete it.)

message: This is an example announcement banner. Turn it on, set the style, and it appears site-wide.

title: Kids & Families
summary: Children are part of the worshipping congregation here, and we welcome their noise and their needs.

title: Serve Our Neighbors
summary: Hands-on ways to love our neighbors, from meal programs to community events.

title: General contact
heading: Send us a note
intro: We read every message and reply during office hours.
successMessage: Thank you. We received your note and will reply soon.
consentNote: We only use your details to reply to you.

title: Connect card
heading: Let us get to know you
intro: New here, or ready for a next step? Tell us a little about yourself and we will follow up this week.

fields.label: Anything you want us to know?
fields.name: message

successMessage: Thank you. Someone from the church will reach out this week.
consentNote: We only use your details to follow up with you, and never share them.

title: Prayer request
heading: How can we pray for you?
intro: Our pastor and prayer team pray over every request. Share as much or as little as you like.

fields.label: Email (optional, if you'd like us to follow up)
fields.name: email

fields.label: Keep this between the pastor and me
fields.name: confidential

successMessage: Thank you for trusting us with this. We are praying with you.
consentNote: Requests are seen only by the pastoral and prayer team.
